---
title: "Seafood Globalization Lab Manual"
subtitle: "Tools, resources, background and more"
---

## Welcome {#welcome}

Welcome to the Seafood Globalization Lab! This website outlines and provides a high level overview of our values and relevant details to apply these values to how we operate as a lab. Please see the sections on the left hand navigation bar.

## Acknowledgements

The content in this manual draws from past and present lab members' experiences across many research teams and data/coding settings. We are also incorporating content from the [Applied Ecology Lab's lab manual](https://scheuerell-lab.github.io/lab-book/index.html), which includes lots of great content, including some UW/SAFS-specific information. We would also like to thank our mentors and collaborators for the examples they have set, the conversations we have had, and the resources they have shared across many years. 

## Land acknowledgment
The University of Washington acknowledges the Coast Salish peoples of this land, the land which touches the shared waters of all tribes and bands within the Suquamish, Tulalip and Muckleshoot nations.
